title: Grounds Maintenance Tender – Bradwell Common & Heelands (Demo)

requirements.text: The tenderer must hold Public Liability insurance of at least £5,000,000 and Employers Liability insurance of at least £10,000,000.
requirements.source_excerpt: The tenderer must hold Public Liability insurance of at least £5,000,000 and Employers Liability insurance of at least £10,000,000.
requirements.draft_answer: AcmeGrounds Ltd meets this requirement. We hold Public Liability insurance of £5,000,000 and Employers Liability insurance of £10,000,000, both current. Certificates are attached in our capability pack.

answer.text: AcmeGrounds Ltd meets this requirement. We hold Public Liability insurance of £5,000,000 and Employers Liability insurance of £10,000,000, both current. Certificates are attached in our capability pack.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Public Liability: £5,000,000 (policy PL-4471-22). Employers Liability: £10,000,000 (policy EL-4471-22). Insurer: Aviva. Renewal date: 01/04/2026.

requirements.text: Any tenderer who cannot guarantee delivery of the Mandatory Requirements and/or the specification will automatically be disqualified from further evaluation.
requirements.source_excerpt: Any tenderer who cannot guarantee delivery of the Mandatory Requirements and/or the specification will automatically be disqualified from further evaluation.

requirements.text: Tenderers must read and confirm the four mandatory pricing statements before submitting prices; failure to confirm acceptance will remove the tenderer from consideration and their bid will not be scored.
requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers must read and confirm the four mandatory pricing statements before submitting prices; failure to confirm acceptance will remove the tenderer from consideration and their bid will not be scored.

requirements.text: The tender must be returned by no later than 17:00hrs on Thursday 31 August to 21 Glovers Lane, Heelands, MK13 7LW.
requirements.source_excerpt: The tender must be returned by no later than 17:00hrs on Thursday 31 August to 21 Glovers Lane, Heelands, MK13 7LW.

requirements.text: No variant bids will be accepted; any bid including proposed amendments to the terms and conditions of contract is deemed a variant bid and will not be accepted.
requirements.source_excerpt: No variant bids will be accepted; any bid including proposed amendments to the terms and conditions of contract is deemed a variant bid and will not be accepted.

requirements.text: A Tender will be rejected if the tenderer fixes or adjusts prices by agreement with any other party, discloses its prices, or agrees that another party shall refrain from tendering.
requirements.source_excerpt: A Tender will be rejected if the tenderer fixes or adjusts prices by agreement with any other party, discloses its prices, or agrees that another party shall refrain from tendering.

requirements.text: A Tender will be rejected if the tenderer offers or agrees to pay any inducement, or commits an offence under the Bribery Act 2010.
requirements.source_excerpt: A Tender will be rejected if the tenderer offers or agrees to pay any inducement, or commits an offence under the Bribery Act 2010.

requirements.text: Any attempt to contact an Officer or Member of the Council by telephone to discuss the Tender will be treated as canvassing and lead to removal of the tenderer from the procurement process.
requirements.source_excerpt: Any attempt to contact an Officer or Member of the Council by telephone to discuss the Tender will be treated as canvassing and lead to removal of the tenderer from the procurement process.

requirements.text: Unsatisfactory scores (0 to 2) for any quality criterion will result in the tender being rejected.
requirements.source_excerpt: Unsatisfactory scores (0 to 2) for any quality criterion will result in the tender being rejected.

requirements.text: Tenderers must satisfy the mandatory criteria (Health & Safety, Insurance and References) before their bid will be considered further.
requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers must satisfy the mandatory criteria (Health & Safety, Insurance and References) before their bid will be considered further.

requirements.text: The deadline for receipt of clarifications or queries relating to this Tender is 15 August.
requirements.source_excerpt: The deadline for receipt of clarifications or queries relating to this Tender is 15 August.

requirements.text: All tender documents must be submitted in a sealed envelope, packet or parcel bearing no name, logo or mark indicating the tenderer's identity.
requirements.source_excerpt: All tender documents must be submitted in a sealed envelope, packet or parcel bearing no name, logo or mark indicating the tenderer's identity.

requirements.text: Tenderers must provide a company profile describing relevant grounds-maintenance experience.
requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers must provide a company profile describing relevant grounds-maintenance experience.
requirements.draft_answer: AcmeGrounds Ltd is a family-run grounds-maintenance contractor established in 2008, serving parish and district councils across the South East.

answer.text: AcmeGrounds Ltd is a family-run grounds-maintenance contractor established in 2008, serving parish and district councils across the South East.

evidence_refs.excerpt: AcmeGrounds Ltd, established 2008. Grounds maintenance, arboriculture and landscaping for parish and district councils.

requirements.text: Tenderers must hold a valid waste carrier licence for the removal of grass arisings and green waste.
requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers must hold a valid waste carrier licence for the removal of grass arisings and green waste.
requirements.draft_answer: AcmeGrounds Ltd holds a valid Upper Tier waste carrier licence (CBDU148820), attached.

answer.text: AcmeGrounds Ltd holds a valid Upper Tier waste carrier licence (CBDU148820), attached.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Environment Agency Upper Tier Waste Carrier registration CBDU148820, valid to 2027.

requirements.text: Tenderers must provide a Health & Safety policy and evidence of a safety management system.
requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers must provide a Health & Safety policy and evidence of a safety management system.
requirements.draft_answer: AcmeGrounds Ltd's Health & Safety policy and CHAS accreditation are attached.

answer.text: AcmeGrounds Ltd's Health & Safety policy and CHAS accreditation are attached.

evidence_refs.excerpt: AcmeGrounds Ltd Health & Safety Policy v4 (2025); CHAS Elite accreditation certificate.

requirements.text: Tenderers must provide two comparable contracts (grounds maintenance) with client contact details as references.
requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers must provide two comparable contracts (grounds maintenance) with client contact details as references.

open_questions.question: Which two comparable public-sector grounds-maintenance contracts should we cite as references, and who is the client contact at each?

requirements.text: The Tenderer is to provide all works included in the tender documents.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Tenderer is to provide all works included in the tender documents.

requirements.text: A schedule of prices is requested in the response pack at appendix D.
requirements.source_excerpt: A schedule of prices is requested in the response pack at appendix D.

requirements.text: Tenderers should, before submitting a Tender, read the Invitation to Tender, including description of Works and Contract details and ensure that they can comply with all obligations.
requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers should, before submitting a Tender, read the Invitation to Tender, including description of Works and Contract details and ensure that they can comply with all obligations.

requirements.text: The Tenderer must, before tendering ascertain the nature of the sites, the extent and nature of the types of work required and all local conditions and restrictions likely to affect the execution of the works.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Tenderer must, before tendering ascertain the nature of the sites, the extent and nature of the types of work required and all local conditions and restrictions likely to affect the execution of the works.

requirements.text: The form of tender will be attached at Appendix D.
requirements.source_excerpt: The form of tender will be attached at Appendix D.

requirements.text: The envelope, packet or parcel shall in no circumstances bear any name, logo or mark indicating the name of the sender.
requirements.source_excerpt: The envelope, packet or parcel shall in no circumstances bear any name, logo or mark indicating the name of the sender.

requirements.text: ensure that they can comply with all obligations.
requirements.source_excerpt: ensure that they can comply with all obligations.

requirements.text: Please provide a Method Statement that clearly covers the following points.
requirements.source_excerpt: Please provide a Method Statement that clearly covers the following points.

requirements.text: Ensuring the commission is adequately resourced, including reference to resources and operational facilities.
requirements.source_excerpt: Ensuring the commission is adequately resourced, including reference to resources and operational facilities.

requirements.text: Ensuring appropriate staff qualifications, knowledge and experience for the commission.
requirements.source_excerpt: Ensuring appropriate staff qualifications, knowledge and experience for the commission.

requirements.text: Tenderers should state on the form (appendix c part 8) if any of the information supplied by them is confidential or commercially sensitive or should not be disclosed in response to a request for information under the act.
requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers should state on the form (appendix c part 8) if any of the information supplied by them is confidential or commercially sensitive or should not be disclosed in response to a request for information under the act.

requirements.text: Suppliers should state why they consider the information to be confidential or commercially sensitive and for how long.
requirements.source_excerpt: Suppliers should state why they consider the information to be confidential or commercially sensitive and for how long.

requirements.text: Approach and management of Health and Safety related to the contract.
requirements.source_excerpt: Approach and management of Health and Safety related to the contract.

requirements.text: The tenderer will have no claim whatsoever against the Council in respect of such matters and in particular (but with no limitation) neither the Council shall make any payments to the tenderer save as expressly provided for in the contract.
requirements.source_excerpt: The tenderer will have no claim whatsoever against the Council in respect of such matters and in particular (but with no limitation) neither the Council shall make any payments to the tenderer save as expressly provided for in the contract.

requirements.text: The documents which constitute the contract and all copies are and will remain the property of the Council and must not be copied or reproduced in whole or in part and must be returned to the Council upon demand.
requirements.source_excerpt: The documents which constitute the contract and all copies are and will remain the property of the Council and must not be copied or reproduced in whole or in part and must be returned to the Council upon demand.

requirements.text: The tenderer warrants and represents that it has completed in all respects with the ITT and the conditions of the Tender.
requirements.source_excerpt: The tenderer warrants and represents that it has completed in all respects with the ITT and the conditions of the Tender.

requirements.text: The tenderer warrants and represents that it has made its own investigations and research and has satisfied itself in respect of all matters relating to the Tender, the specification and the Conditions of Contract.
requirements.source_excerpt: The tenderer warrants and represents that it has made its own investigations and research and has satisfied itself in respect of all matters relating to the Tender, the specification and the Conditions of Contract.

requirements.text: The tenderer warrants and represents that it has full power and authority to enter into the contract and will if requested produce evidence of such to the Council.
requirements.source_excerpt: The tenderer warrants and represents that it has full power and authority to enter into the contract and will if requested produce evidence of such to the Council.

requirements.text: The tenderer warrants and represents that it is of sound financial standing and the tenderer and its partners, officers and employees are not aware of any circumstances which may adversely affect such financial standing in the future.
requirements.source_excerpt: The tenderer warrants and represents that it is of sound financial standing and the tenderer and its partners, officers and employees are not aware of any circumstances which may adversely affect such financial standing in the future.

requirements.text: Consideration must be given to all risks associated with the works when planning landscaping maintenance operations.
requirements.source_excerpt: Consideration must be given to all risks associated with the works when planning landscaping maintenance operations.

requirements.text: Operatives must always wear high visibility garments in accordance BSEN 471 Class 1 and wear Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) appropriate to the work task and as identified in the contractor’s risk assessment and method statement.
requirements.source_excerpt: Operatives must always wear high visibility garments in accordance BSEN 471 Class 1 and wear Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) appropriate to the work task and as identified in the contractor’s risk assessment and method statement.

requirements.text: The standard of maintenance shall be in accordance with good horticultural practice, in line with species recommendations and the recommendations laid down in BS4428:1989 - “Code of Practice for General Landscape Operations”.
requirements.source_excerpt: The standard of maintenance shall be in accordance with good horticultural practice, in line with species recommendations and the recommendations laid down in BS4428:1989 - “Code of Practice for General Landscape Operations”.

requirements.text: The Contractor shall allow for the removal of all arising’s in connection with landscape maintenance operations.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Contractor shall allow for the removal of all arising’s in connection with landscape maintenance operations.

requirements.text: The contractor will be responsible for effective weed control on shrub/flower/rose beds, hedge bottoms and hard surfaces as specified.
requirements.source_excerpt: The contractor will be responsible for effective weed control on shrub/flower/rose beds, hedge bottoms and hard surfaces as specified.

requirements.text: They must however conform to current health and safety legislation and industry best practice including the Code of Practice noted below.
requirements.source_excerpt: They must however conform to current health and safety legislation and industry best practice including the Code of Practice noted below.

requirements.text: The Contractor shall undertake such maintenance as is necessary on trees.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Contractor shall undertake such maintenance as is necessary on trees.

requirements.text: Where the requirement is for the stump to be ground out or chemically treated the Contractor shall submit a quote.
requirements.source_excerpt: Where the requirement is for the stump to be ground out or chemically treated the Contractor shall submit a quote.

requirements.text: Removal of tree trunks and large branches are to be agreed with the contract administrator (the Clerk).
requirements.source_excerpt: Removal of tree trunks and large branches are to be agreed with the contract administrator (the Clerk).

requirements.text: Chippings, where agreed with the contract administrator (the Clerk) from the undertaking of tree services may be left on site but must be raked out evenly over the adjoining land.
requirements.source_excerpt: Chippings, where agreed with the contract administrator (the Clerk) from the undertaking of tree services may be left on site but must be raked out evenly over the adjoining land.

requirements.text: The Contractor shall submit a quote where the relevant skills are available and the need can be addressed by tree climbing or simple felling.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Contractor shall submit a quote where the relevant skills are available and the need can be addressed by tree climbing or simple felling.

requirements.text: The Contractor shall reinstate the land according to its surroundings where a stump is ground out.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Contractor shall reinstate the land according to its surroundings where a stump is ground out.

requirements.text: The Contractor shall not delegate any duties or obligations arising under this agreement otherwise than may be expressly permitted under its terms.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Contractor shall not delegate any duties or obligations arising under this agreement otherwise than may be expressly permitted under its terms.

requirements.text: The Contractor shall indemnify and keep indemnified the Council from and against any and all loss damage or liability suffered and legal fees and cost incurred by the Council resulting from a breach of this agreement by the Contractor.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Contractor shall indemnify and keep indemnified the Council from and against any and all loss damage or liability suffered and legal fees and cost incurred by the Council resulting from a breach of this agreement by the Contractor.

requirements.text: The Contractor shall comply with the terms of any Notice specifying a breach of the provisions of this agreement and requiring the breach to be remedied.
requirements.source_excerpt: The Contractor shall comply with the terms of any Notice specifying a breach of the provisions of this agreement and requiring the breach to be remedied.
